name: nexus-similarity-search-api

description_variants.claude: Computes hybrid NMI+Cosine similarity over raw text, categorical, or discrete time-series data on-the-fly, without requiring pre-built vector indexes or embedding pipelines, using entropy-weighted scoring to surface statistically dependent items that cosine similarity misses.
description_variants.gpt: Call this function to find similar items in raw datasets using Normalized Mutual Information combined with cosine similarity; use it when inputs are unembedded text or categorical data and you need non-linear statistical dependence detection without a vector store.
description_variants.gemini: Tool for on-the-fly similarity search over raw structured or unstructured data using an entropy-weighted NMI+Cosine hybrid metric; invoke when no vector index exists and similarity must capture non-linear variable dependence beyond what dot-product metrics provide.

value_equivalent: $140 por hora de trabajo manual ahorrado
invocation_examples: Find the 5 product descriptions most similar to this new listing without running an embedding pipeline first
Rank these 200 customer support tickets by statistical similarity to this reference complaint using mutual information
Detect duplicate or near-duplicate categorical survey responses across this dataset without a pre-built index
